zh.lifeSummary: 當Alis Cary於大約1145年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特諾斯 卡德波利時，她的父親Henry d'Ivry36歲，母親Matilda de Boulogne44歲。她於1165年與Henry Lovel Lord of Cary在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1212年之後在英國英格蘭薩默塞特皮可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alis Cary于大约1145年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特諾斯 卡德波利时，她的父亲Henry d'Ivry36岁，母亲Matilda de Boulogne44岁。她于1165年与Henry Lovel Lord of Cary在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1212年之后在英国英格兰薩默塞特皮可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Cary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Donegal and Westmeath) and English: variant of   Carey  .

variants.name: Decorah
meanings: Americanized form of de Carrie, itself an altered form of French Decary, a variant of Cary 2, with fused preposition de ‘of’. It is found mainly among the Ho-Chunk (i.e. Winnebago) Native American people in WI.

History: The progenitor of the Decorahs was a French soldier, Joseph Sabrevoir de Carrie, who in 1729 settled for a time among the Winnebagos on Doty Island, WI, and married an Indian woman, known in English as Glory of the Morning. Decorah, a city in IA, is named after one of their descendants, Waukon Decorah (c. 1780–1868), a chief of the Winnebago.

variants.name: Carey
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ciardha, a midland surname meaning ‘descendant of Ciardha’, a personal name derived from ciar ‘dark, black’. See Kerry .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhiachra ‘son of Fiachra’.

English: from Carey Barton in Devon or Castle Cary, Lytes Cary, Cary Fitzpaine, or Babcary, all in Somerset, named for the rivers on which they stand; both river names probably derive from the Celtic root car- ‘love, liking’, perhaps with the meaning ‘pleasant stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Alis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Alice
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alis Cary was born about 1145, in North Cadbury, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry d'Ivry, was 36 and her mother, Matilda de Boulogne, was 44. She married Henry Lovel Lord of Cary in 1165, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died after 1212, in Pitcombe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alis Cary est née environ 1145, à North Cadbury, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry d'Ivry, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Boulogne, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Lovel Lord of Cary en 1165, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée après 1212, à Pitcombe, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1165 in England, United Kingdom Henry Lovel Lord of Cary geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1212 in Pitcombe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Henry Lovel Lord of Cary nel 1165, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì dopo il 1212, nel Pitcombe, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alis Caryが約1145年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトノース カドブリーで生まれた時，父Henry d'Ivryは36歳，母Matilda de Boulogneは44歳であった。1165年にイギリスイギリスでHenry Lovel Lord of Caryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1212年以後にイギリスイギリスソメルセトピトコンベで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alis Cary(이)가 대략 1145년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 노르스 카드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry d'Ivry(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda de Boulogne(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1165년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Henry Lovel Lord of Cary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1212년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 피트코브에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alis Cary родилась около 1145 г. в местности норт кадбури, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry d'Ivry было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Boulogne, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Lovel Lord of Cary в 1165 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла после 1212 г. в местности питкомб, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
